ogTitle: Hamel vs Hamelin Pool: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hamel and Hamelin Pool.
heading: Hamel vs Hamelin Pool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hamel, Western Australia and Hamelin Pool, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hamel has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Hamelin Pool (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hamel or Hamelin Pool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hamel has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Hamelin Pool scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hamel scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Hamelin Pool scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hamel or Hamelin Pool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hamel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
